allow: Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -c "CREATE USER bookshelf WITH PASSWORD ''bookshelf2024'' CREATEDB;")
Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -c "CREATE DATABASE bookshelf_db OWNER bookshelf;")
Bash(psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -c "CREATE USER bookshelf WITH PASSWORD ''bookshelf2024'' CREATEDB;")
Bash(psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE bookshelf_db OWNER bookshelf;")
Bash(psql -h /var/run/postgresql -p 5432 -U postgres -c "CREATE USER bookshelf WITH PASSWORD ''bookshelf2024'' CREATEDB;")
Bash(psql -h /var/run/postgresql -p 5432 -U postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE bookshelf_db OWNER bookshelf;")

Bash(bash -c 'export NVM_DIR=""$HOME/.nvm"" && . ""$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"" && nvm use 20.20.1 && DATABASE_URL=""postgresql://automate@localhost/bookshelf_db?host=/var/run/postgresql"" npx prisma generate 2>&1 | tail -5')
Bash(bash -c 'export NVM_DIR=""$HOME/.nvm"" && . ""$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"" && nvm use 20.20.1 && npm run build 2>&1')
Bash(bash -c 'export NVM_DIR=""$HOME/.nvm"" && . ""$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"" && nvm use 20.20.1 && npm install @prisma/adapter-pg pg 2>&1 | tail -5')
Bash(bash -c 'export NVM_DIR=""$HOME/.nvm"" && . ""$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"" && nvm use 20.20.1 && npm install @prisma/adapter-pg pg 2>&1')

Bash(bash -c 'export NVM_DIR=""$HOME/.nvm"" && . ""$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"" && nvm use 20.20.1 && DATABASE_URL=""postgresql://automate@localhost/bookshelf_db?host=/var/run/postgresql"" npx ts-node --esm prisma/seed.ts 2>&1 | tail -30')
Bash(bash -c 'export NVM_DIR=""$HOME/.nvm"" && . ""$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"" && nvm use 20.20.1 && node --experimental-vm-modules prisma/seed.mjs 2>&1')
Bash(bash -c 'export NVM_DIR=""$HOME/.nvm"" && . ""$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"" && nvm use 20.20.1 && node --version && npx prisma --version 2>&1 | head -5')
